title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Amazon India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Amazon India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Amazon India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Digital Marketing Manager to strengthen our Madurai-based team.

About Amazon India:
Amazon India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Magento

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amazon India!
